fallback_contact.name: Warren Koop
fallback_contact.title: Owner / Principal, Alair Homes Winnipeg
fallback_contact.rationale: Alair Winnipeg is a franchise owned by Warren Koop. He is the decision-maker for trade selection. Alair primarily does custom homes and renovations — lighter commercial fit, but high-end residential paint scopes are a real opportunity. Warren is a third-generation Manitoba builder, grew up on job sites with his father, and is involved with Habitat for Humanity (community/charity hook for Ahmad). Started Alair Manitoba in 2015. Office: 126 Cordova St, Winnipeg, MB R3N 1A1.

needs_review_flags: Alair is residential/reno-focused — different fit than commercial GC; consider only if Ashrah pursues high-end residential paint
No separate estimator role surfaced; Warren is the buyer
personalization_hooks: Third-generation Manitoba home builder — strong shared-Manitoba-roots angle
Habitat for Humanity involvement (per Alair team page bio) — community connection if Ahmad has any Habitat ties
Started Alair Manitoba franchise from scratch in 2015 — entrepreneur-to-entrepreneur framing works
Office is in St. James (Cordova St)

sources.claim: Warren Koop is Owner/Principal of Alair Homes Winnipeg
